home.title: mundial02fra01
home.welcome_text:
The Mundial Leisure Center is a modern and beautiful place, in the heart of nature. Our offer includes both sports and relaxation.
Furthermore, our bistro offers good food and fine beverages.

With us, you will find many leisure activities for you, your friends and your family. We also organize Christmas parties and birthday parties for everyone. Discover our leisure center on the internet now. Let yourself be surprised by our wide range of offers!
home.sauna_text: Our sauna area covers approximately 1,500 m². Experience the fascination of heat in one of our five saunas with different temperatures (two indoor saunas and three outdoor saunas). Whether in winter or summer, the sauna is a special form of heat-cold treatment that promotes health and relaxation. Among other things, saunas stimulate metabolism, stabilize the cardiovascular system and help exercise the vascular system. We recommend you take three sauna sessions, as additional sessions do not provide further health benefits and can lead to fatigue of body functions.
home.pool_text: Our natural pool offers bathing water that is qualitatively comparable to that of a natural lake or deep pond. Enjoy the pleasures of natural swimming in water without chlorine or chemicals. With a breathtaking view of nature, you can relax here.
home.offer_pool_text: Swimming is healthy and strengthens our body and mind. Enjoy swimming in a pleasant atmosphere in our indoor pool. There's something for everyone, from young to old.
home.offer_restaurant_text: Activity makes you hungry and thirsty. That's why there's also a restaurant and bar in the Mundial Leisure Center where you can eat well and enjoy fine beverages. This will give you new energy. We look forward to your visit. Bon appétit and cheers!
home.offer_minigolf_text: Enjoy a game of mini-golf on our mini-golf course. Our 20-hole mini-golf course is located in the heart of our nature park. Nature and fun for the whole family.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro:
Enter your first name, last name, phone number and email address in the contact form below. And ask us your questions in the contact form. We will be happy to answer you personally.

We also organize birthday parties and events that you enjoy. Music, catering and beverages are of course included. Would you like to organize such a party? Then write to us also in the contact form. The map above shows you the way to us.
contact.form_success: Thank you! Your message was sent successfully.
contact.card_text:
Do you visit us often? With the Mundial Card, you can enjoy all the offers of the Mundial Leisure Center for a whole year. This includes mini golf, bowling, sauna and swimming pool. You no longer have to worry about admission. Show your card at the entrance and enter. Order your personal Mundial annual subscription today.
‍
CHF 1'420.-

preise.title: Prices
preise.heading: Prices
preise.all_section: Admission to the entire leisure center (All offers)
preise.note_pool: Children under 12 years must be accompanied by an adult in the indoor pool.
preise.note_sauna: Children under 16 years must be accompanied by an adult in the sauna and steam room.
preise.note_bowling: Children under 12 years must be accompanied by an adult on the bowling lane.
preise.note_minigolf: Children under 12 years must be accompanied by an adult when playing mini-golf.
preise.note_all: In the sauna and in the steam room, children under 16 years must be accompanied by an adult.
preise.card_text:
Do you visit us often? With the Mundial Card, you can enjoy all the offers of the Mundial Leisure Center for a whole year. This includes mini golf, bowling, sauna and swimming pool. You no longer have to worry about admission. Show your card at the entrance and enter. Order your personal Mundial annual subscription today.
‍
CHF 1'420.-


You can request the Mundial Card on our contact page.
preise.payment_text: All prices are in Swiss francs. Price changes are possible. You can pay the admission fee in cash (francs or euros), or by bank card.
preise.entry_1game: Admission per person for 1 game round

oeffnungszeiten.title: Opening Hours
oeffnungszeiten.heading: Opening Hours
oeffnungszeiten.intro: Here you will find the opening hours of the Mundial Leisure Center and the various offers. Please note that the opening hours of the Mundial Leisure Center may change according to the seasons.
oeffnungszeiten.tab_reception: Opening hours of reception and entrance area
oeffnungszeiten.tab_secretariat: Opening hours of secretariat and operational management
oeffnungszeiten.tab_restaurant: Opening hours of restaurant and bars
oeffnungszeiten.tab_pool: Opening hours of swimming pool and changing rooms
oeffnungszeiten.tab_sauna: Opening hours of steam room and sauna
oeffnungszeiten.tab_bowling: Opening hours of bowling and snack vending machine
oeffnungszeiten.tab_fitness: Opening hours of fitness trainer office

aufgabe.title: Task
aufgabe.task1_text:
A friend told you how beneficial the aroma sauna at the Mundial Leisure Center is. You would like to try it yourself next week.
Use the Mundial website to find out whether the aroma sauna is open in winter.

start.title: Tasks
start.tasks_intro:
For this test of the Mundial Leisure Center website, we ask you to complete two tasks.
‍
You can always view the task with the green "Task" button.
‍
If you cannot solve a task after approximately 4 minutes, we ask you to skip it. You will find this function directly below the task statement.
‍

task01.title: Task 1
task01.task_text:
A friend told you how beneficial the aroma sauna at the Mundial Leisure Center is. You would like to try it yourself next week.
Use the Mundial website to find out whether the aroma sauna is open in winter.

task02.title: Task 2
task02.task_text: You would like to come to Mundial with a group of friends to play bowling. How much does admission cost for 1 game round for 1 adult?

task03.title: Task 3
task03.task_text: You would like to organize a birthday party for your child at Mundial. What birthday offers are available?

angebote.pool_text: Our indoor pool offers a swimming area of approximately 1,000 m². It offers bathing water that is qualitatively comparable to that of a natural lake or deep pond. Enjoy the pleasures of natural swimming in water without chlorine or chemicals. With a breathtaking view of nature, you can relax here. Check out the prices for the swimming pool.
angebote.minigolf_text:
Enjoy a game of mini-golf on our mini-golf course. Our 20-hole mini-golf course is located in the heart of our nature park. Nature and fun for the whole family! The extra length of some holes is a special challenge and guarantees fun playing!

Do you have a special occasion? No problem, because with us you can also celebrate together. Unforgettable children's birthday parties or a corporate event are possible on request.
angebote.bowling_text: Bowling is fun and keeps you moving! Come play with your friends or family in our modern bowling facility. We have 12 state-of-the-art bowling lanes. Our bowling lanes are equipped with automatic score display, automatic pin setters and child protection systems.
angebote.restaurant_text: Activity makes you hungry and thirsty. That's why there's also a restaurant and bar in the Mundial Leisure Center where you can eat well and enjoy fine beverages. This will give you new energy. We look forward to your visit. Bon appétit and cheers!
angebote.birthday_text: Organize an unforgettable birthday party for your children or friends at Mundial! We offer various birthday options for all ages.
angebote.waiting_text: Please wait a moment, it is probably loading.
angebote.kauf_mundialcard_text: Order your personal Mundial annual subscription today.
angebote.reservation_text: Reserve your birthday party with us.
angebote.complete_text: Your reservation has been completed successfully.

no_way.title: No way
no_way.heading: This page is not part of the test
